description: Happy path: clear informational keyword with platform signal returns high-confidence classification

input.keyword: how to style a thrift store lamp on a moody nightstand

expect.keyword: how to style a thrift store lamp on a moody nightstand
expect.intent.label: informational
expect.content_format_fit.rationale: present, references question framing and action verb signals
expect.rationale: present, two to four sentences referencing word-level signals

prohibit: fabricated search volume or difficulty scores

description: Minimal inputs: keyword only with no platform, returns platform-agnostic classification

expect.intent.label: one of: informational | commercial | transactional | navigational
expect.content_format_fit.primary: one of the five format types

prohibit: platform-specific format scoring when no platform was provided
fabricated SERP data or live search results

description: Edge case: ambiguous short keyword returns low confidence with noted ambiguity

expect.intent.label: one of: informational | commercial | transactional | navigational
expect.confidence.note: present, explains the keyword is too short or generic
expect.content_format_fit.secondary: present, since the keyword is ambiguous
expect.notes: present, describes alternate interpretations or caveats

prohibit: high confidence on a two-word ambiguous keyword
